title: coelandria obtusa
intro: Coelandria obtusa, also known as the 'Frog Orchid', is a species of flowering plant in the family Orchidaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its various medicinal properties, including antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Coelandria obtusa include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
